## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Testing

- [ ] I ran the relevant tests locally
- [ ] I added or updated tests when behavior changed
- [ ] I updated documentation for user-visible changes

## Checklist

- [ ] The change matches the current public API strategy
- [ ] Request and response schema changes are reflected in the docs
- [ ] Error handling still returns CAP-compatible payloads where applicable
- [ ] Changelog entry added or updated when needed
